# server-start => dist folders

We should create 2 new starting point scripts for

1. dist/development
2. dist/production

in this environment it actually would make sense to combine it with the related webpack builds and enable features like hot module replacements.

i am not an expert on webpack though, so help on this one would be appreciated!
